zh.lifeSummary: 當Luitgard von Sulzbach於1109年11月18日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 艾其哈-福利德格艾其哈賀素爾茲巴賀時，她的父親Berengar II. von Sulzbach30歲，母親Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen26歲。她於大約1139年與Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1162年1月2日享年52歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Luitgard von Sulzbach于1109年11月18日出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 艾其哈-福利德格艾其哈賀素爾茲巴賀时，她的父亲Berengar II. von Sulzbach30岁，母亲Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen26岁。她于大约1139年与Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1162年1月2日享年52岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sulzbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst.
German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the many places called Sulzbach.

nameMeanings.name: Luitgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Luitgard von Sulzbach was born on 18 November 1109, in Sulzbach, Aichach, Aichach-Friedberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, was 30 and her mother, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, was 26. She married Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen about 1139. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 January 1162, at the age of 52, and was buried in Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Luitgard von Sulzbach est née le 18 novembre 1109, à Sulzbach, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen environ 1139. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1162, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Luitgard von Sulzbach am 18. November 1109 in Sulzbach, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Berengar II. von Sulzbach 30 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen 26. Sie hat um 1139 Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1162 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Luitgard von Sulzbach è nata il il 18 novembre 1109 nel Sulzbach, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen circa 1139. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 gennaio 1162, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ko.lifeSummary: Luitgard von Sulzbach(이)가 1109년 11월 18일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아이차ch-프리드버그 아이차치 설즈바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berengar II. von Sulzbach(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1139년 Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 1월 2일 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Luitgard von Sulzbach nasceu em 18 de novembro de 1109, em Sulzbach, Aichach, Landkreis Aichach-Friedberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Berengar II. von Sulzbach, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen aproximadamente 1139. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1162, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Luitgard von Sulzbach родилась 18 ноября 1109 г. в местности сулзбач, эичач, ландкрис эичач-фриедбирг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Berengar II. von Sulzbach было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen около 1139 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 января 1162 г. в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

Se casó con Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen aproximadamente 1139. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
